WarStrike

In the ocean of shoot-'em-all games, finding an online shooter that meets your console gamer expectations can feel impossible. After playing legends like Counter-Strike or Far Cry, other online FPS games may seem bland, lacking an immersive story. But believe it or not, WarStrike will give you the taste of playing Call of Duty: Modern Warfare, all from the comfort of your browser. WarStrike's campaign mode takes you deep into a critical mission as an elite MI-6 Special Soldier.

Play WarStrike Online

Loading game...
About WarStrike

In the ocean of shoot-'em-all games, finding an online shooter that meets your console gamer expectations can feel impossible. After playing legends like Counter-Strike or Far Cry, other online FPS games may seem bland, lacking an immersive story. But believe it or not, WarStrike will give you the taste of playing Call of Duty: Modern Warfare, all from the comfort of your browser. WarStrike's campaign mode takes you deep into a critical mission as an elite MI-6 Special Soldier. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load WarStrike in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play WarStrike for free?

Yes. WarStrike is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install WarStrike?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
